message:
Command `# SRAM seems to be hanging - let's check TB_MAX_CYCLES
cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526
timeout 35 /tmp/sram_test.vvp 2>&1 | grep -E "SRAM_SEQ|PASS|FAIL|MISMATCH|SMOKE|timeout|$finish"` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments: {"command": "# SRAM seems to be hanging - let's check TB_MAX_CYCLES\ncd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526\ntimeout 35 /tmp/sram_test.vvp 2>&1 | grep -E \"SRAM_SEQ|PASS|FAIL|MISMATCH|SMOKE|timeout|$finish\""}
function.name: execute_bash
